preservation_rules: Preserve claim_pack_id, tenant_id, request_id, schema_version and provenance identities.
Preserve citation refs, source links, jurisdiction, legal disclaimer and allowed paraphrase scope.
Reject or review expired, superseded, contradictory or out-of-jurisdiction claims.
Retry network failures with the same Idempotency-Key and never add uncited claims under the same pack identity.
limitations: This provider-side kit does not prove that the Content Agency repository consumes the contracts correctly.
The kit does not authorize content generation, campaign strategy, publication or production traffic.
